title: NIH Biomedical API Domain Vocabulary
description: Domain-specific terms and concepts used across NIH public APIs

terms.label: PubMed Identifier
terms.description: Unique integer identifier for PubMed citations

terms.label: PubMed Central Identifier
terms.description: Unique identifier for PMC full-text articles

terms.label: National Clinical Trial Identifier
terms.description: Unique identifier for ClinicalTrials.gov study records (format: NCTxxxxxxxx)

terms.label: Compound Identifier
terms.description: PubChem unique integer identifier for chemical compounds

terms.label: Substance Identifier
terms.description: PubChem unique identifier for deposited substances

terms.label: Assay Identifier
terms.description: PubChem unique identifier for biological assays

terms.label: NCBI Gene Identifier
terms.description: Unique integer identifier for genes in the NCBI Gene database

terms.label: Taxonomy Identifier
terms.description: NCBI taxonomy database unique identifier for organisms

terms.label: GenBank Accession Number
terms.description: Alphanumeric identifier for biological sequence records

terms.label: Request Identifier
terms.description: BLAST search request identifier for checking job status

terms.label: Entrez Search
terms.description: E-utility for searching any Entrez database and returning UIDs

terms.label: Entrez Fetch
terms.description: E-utility for retrieving records in various formats using UIDs

terms.label: Entrez Link
terms.description: E-utility for linking records between Entrez databases

terms.label: Entrez Summary
terms.description: E-utility for retrieving document summaries for UIDs

terms.label: Entrez Info
terms.description: E-utility for retrieving database statistics and field information

terms.label: Web Environment
terms.description: NCBI server-side storage token for caching search results

terms.label: Query Key
terms.description: Integer key referencing a cached Entrez search result

terms.label: Retrieval Maximum
terms.description: Maximum number of records to return from E-utility queries

terms.label: Retrieval Start
terms.description: Starting offset for paginating E-utility results

terms.label: Study Overall Status
terms.description: Current recruitment status of a clinical trial (RECRUITING, COMPLETED, etc.)

terms.label: Study Phase
terms.description: Clinical trial phase designation (PHASE1, PHASE2, PHASE3, PHASE4)

terms.label: NIH Fiscal Year
terms.description: Government fiscal year (Oct 1 - Sep 30) for NIH funding records

terms.label: NIH Activity Code
terms.description: Code designating NIH award mechanism type (R01, R21, K08, etc.)

terms.label: Direct Costs
terms.description: NIH grant funds allocated directly to the research project

terms.label: Indirect Costs
terms.description: NIH grant funds for institutional overhead (F&A costs)

terms.label: Basic Local Alignment Search Tool
terms.description: Algorithm for finding similar sequences in biological databases

terms.label: Expect Value
terms.description: BLAST statistical measure of sequence alignment significance

terms.label: BLAST Bit Score
terms.description: Normalized score for BLAST alignment quality comparison across databases
